Global (All).title: US Senate Passes Bipartisan Gun Control Bill
Global (All).summary: The US Senate passed a bipartisan gun control bill following a series of mass shootings. The bill aims to expand background checks and address "red flag" laws.

Global (All).title: North Korea Condemns US-South Korea Joint Military Exercises
Global (All).summary: North Korea condemned the joint military exercises between the US and South Korea, citing a provocation that could lead to war.

Global (All).title: Russia-Ukraine Conflict: Heavy Fighting in Eastern Ukraine
Global (All).summary: Heavy fighting continues in eastern Ukraine, with reports of civilian casualties and damaged infrastructure.

United States.title: Mass Shooting at Highland Park Independence Day Parade
United States.summary: At least six people were killed and dozens injured in a mass shooting at a July 4th parade in Highland Park, Illinois, a Chicago suburb. The suspect, Robert 'Bobby' Crimo III, 21, was taken into custody after a manhunt.

United States.title: US Supreme Court Overturns Roe v. Wade
United States.summary: The landmark abortion rights case Roe v. Wade was overturned by the US Supreme Court in a historic decision that gives individual states greater authority to regulate abortion. The ruling sparked widespread protests and outrage.

United States.title: Heat Wave and Wildfires Wreak Havoc Across the West Coast
United States.summary: A severe heat wave and record-breaking temperatures fueled devastating wildfires across the US West Coast, forcing evacuations and destroying homes in several states, including California and Arizona.

South Korea.title: South Korea, US hold joint naval drill amid tensions with North Korea
South Korea.summary: South Korea and the United States have held a joint naval drill, sparking concerns from North Korea which has been testing its missile capabilities.

South Korea.title: South Korean prosecutors raid Samsung offices over corrupt bidding scandal
South Korea.summary: Prosecutors in South Korea have raided Samsung's offices as part of an investigation into a corrupt bidding scandal.

South Korea.title: South Korea's president faces criticism over slow response to COVID-19 Omicron variant
South Korea.summary: South Korea's president has faced criticism over the government's slow response to the COVID-19 Omicron variant, which has led to an increase in cases.

Japan.title: North Korea launches ballistic missile over Japan, prompting criticism from US and Japan
Japan.summary: North Korea fired a ballistic missile on Wednesday that flew over Japan and landed in the Pacific Ocean, prompting a strong condemnation from Tokyo and Washington.

Japan.title: China, Japan, and South Korea agree to work together to address North Korea's nuclear threat
Japan.summary: The foreign ministers of China, Japan, and South Korea agreed to cooperate on addressing the security challenges posed by North Korea's nuclear and missile programs.

Japan.title: Japan's defense minister vows to boost military spending in response to North Korea's missile launch
Japan.summary: Japan's defense minister announced plans to increase military spending in response to North Korea's recent missile launch, which he said posed a significant threat to national security.
